_comment: KB-2 HBP 2022 — Burns Management. Deterministic fields set by kb2_extractor.py. Fill: mandatory_documents, aliases, stratification_criteria, additional_information.

procedures.procedure_name: Criteria 1: % Total Body Surface Area Burns (TBSA):less than 20% in adults and less than 10% in children younger  than 12 years. Dressing without anesthesia

preauth.label: Extent of burns visible on photograph (with rule of 9 chart)

claim.label: lab tests or other diagnostic procedures done as a part of treatment

additional_information.admission_criteria: Less than 20% TBSA in adults and less than 10% in children younger than 12 years
additional_information.mlc_note: MLC is required for thermal burns as they are medico-legal cases

procedures.procedure_name: Criteria 2: % Total Body Surface Area Burns (TBSA): Upto 25%; Includes % TBSA skin grafted, flap cover, follow-up dressings etc. as deemed necessary; Surgical procedures are required for deep burns that are not amenable to heal with dressings alone.

preauth.label: Extent of upto 40% burns visible on photograph (with rule of 9 chart)

claim.label: other diagnostic procedures done as a part of treatment

additional_information.admission_criteria: Upto 25% TBSA requiring surgical procedures like skin grafting, flap cover for deep burns
additional_information.mlc_note: MLC is required for thermal burns as they are medico-legal cases

procedures.procedure_name: Criteria 3: % Total Body Surface Area Burns (TBSA): 25-40 %; Includes % TBSA skin grafted, flap cover, follow-up dressings etc. as deemed necessary; Surgical procedures are required for deep burns that are not amenable to heal with dressings alone.

preauth.label: Extent of upto 40% - 60% burns visible on photograph (with rule of 9 chart)

claim.label: other diagnostic procedures done as a part of treatment

additional_information.admission_criteria: 25-40% TBSA deep burns requiring surgery, skin grafted, flap cover
additional_information.mlc_note: MLC is required for thermal burns as they are medico-legal cases

procedures.procedure_name: Criteria 4: % Total Body Surface Area Burns (TBSA):40- 60 %; Includes % TBSA skin grafted, flap cover, follow-up dressings etc. as deemed necessary; Surgical procedures are required for deep burns that are not amenable to heal with dressings alone.

preauth.label: Extent > 60% burns visible on photograph (with rule of 9 chart)

claim.label: other diagnostic procedures done as a part of treatment

additional_information.admission_criteria: 40-60% TBSA deep burns requiring surgery, skin grafted, flap cover
additional_information.mlc_note: MLC is required for thermal burns as they are medico-legal cases

procedures.procedure_name: Criteria 5: % Total Body Surface Area Burns (TBSA):60-80 %; Includes % TBSA skin grafted, flap cover, follow-up dressings etc. as deemed necessary; Surgical procedures are required for deep burns that are not amenable to heal with dressings alone.

preauth.label: Extent of upto 80% burns visible on photograph (with rule of 9 chart)

claim.label: other diagnostic procedures done as a part of treatment

additional_information.admission_criteria: 60-80% TBSA deep burns requiring surgery, skin grafted, flap cover
additional_information.mlc_note: MLC is required for thermal burns as they are medico-legal cases

procedures.procedure_name: Electrical contact burns: Low voltage - without part of limb / limb loss; Includes % TBSA skin grafted, flap cover, follow-up dressings etc. as deemed necessary; Surgical procedures are required for deep burns that are not amenable to heal with dressings alone.

preauth.label: Circumstances that led to low voltage electrical contact burns
% burns visible on clinical photograph (with rule of 9 chart)

claim.label: other diagnostic procedures done as a part of treatment

additional_information.admission_criteria: Low voltage electrical contact burns without limb loss, requiring surgical procedures like skin grafting, flap cover
additional_information.mlc_note: MLC is required for electrical burns as they are medico-legal cases

procedures.procedure_name: Electrical contact burns: Low voltage - with part of limb / limb loss; Includes % TBSA skin grafted, flap cover, follow-up dressings Amputation  etc. as deemed necessary; Surgical procedures are required for deep burns that are not amenable to heal with dressings alone.

preauth.label: Circumstances that led to low voltage electrical contact burns
% burns visible on clinical photograph (with rule of 9 chart)

aliases: Electrical burns low voltage with amputation
Low tension electrical burns limb loss
Electrical contact burns with limb loss

additional_information.admission_criteria: Low voltage electrical contact burns with part of limb/limb loss requiring surgery (amputation, grafting)
additional_information.mlc_note: MLC is required for electrical burns as they are medico-legal cases

procedures.procedure_name: Electrical contact burns: High voltage - with part of limb / limb loss; Includes % TBSA skin grafted, flap cover,fasciotomy +/- /amputation/Central IV Line/debridement/early skin grafting pedicle or free flap coverage,follow-up dressings etc. as deemed necessary; Surgical procedures are required for deep burns that are not amenable to heal with dressings alone.

additional_information.mlc_note: MLC is required for electrical burns as they are medico-legal cases

procedures.procedure_name: Electrical contact burns: High voltage - without part of limb / limb loss; Includes % TBSA skin grafted, flap cover, fasciotomy +/- /debridement/early skin grafting/flap cover: pedicle or free flap coverage,follow-up dressings etc. as deemed necessary; Surgical procedures are required for deep burns that are not amenable to heal with dressings alone.

preauth.label: Circumstances that led to High voltage electrical contact burns
% burns visible on clinical photograph (with rule of 9 chart)

aliases: High voltage electrical burns without amputation

additional_information.mlc_note: MLC is required for electrical burns as they are medico-legal cases

procedures.procedure_name:
Chemical burns: Without significant facial scarring and/or loss of function; Includes % TBSA skin grafted, flap cover, follow-up dressings etc. as deemed necessary; Surgical procedures are required for deep burns that are not amenable to heal with dressings alone.(Similar to therma burns
require more grafting, debridement,(skin grafing/canthopexy)

preauth.label: Circumstances that led to chemical burns
% and area burnt visible on clinical photograph (with rule of 9 chart)

claim.label: Post Treatment clinical photograph showing treated burns
other diagnostic procedures done as a part of treatment

additional_information.admission_criteria: Deep chemical burns requiring surgery, skin grafting, or flap cover, without significant facial scarring/loss of function
additional_information.mlc_note: MLC is required for chemical burns as they are medico-legal cases

procedures.procedure_name: Chemical burns: With significant facial scarring and/or loss of function; Includes % TBSA skin grafted, flap cover,debridement,skin grafting,follow-up dressings etc. as deemed necessary; Surgical procedures are required for deep burns that are not amenable to heal with dressings alone.

preauth.label: Circumstances that led to chemical burns
% and area burnt visible on clinical photograph (with rule of 9 chart)

claim.label: Post Treatment clinical photograph showing treated burns
other diagnostic procedures done as a part of treatment

additional_information.admission_criteria: Deep chemical burns with significant facial scarring or loss of function requiring surgery
additional_information.mlc_note: MLC is required for chemical burns as they are medico-legal cases

packages.package_name: Post Burn Contracture surgeries for Functional Improvement

procedures.procedure_name: Post Burn Contracture surgeries for Functional Improvement (Package including splints, pressure garments, silicone - gel sheet and physiotherapy): Excluding Neck contracture; Contracture release with - Split thickness Skin Graft (STSG) / Full Thickness Skin Graft (FTSG) / Flap cover is done for each joint with post - operative regular dressings for STSG / FTSG / Flap cover.

preauth.label: Clinical history detailing the burns - etiology, treatment given and resultant contractures left
Functional disability to be detailed and expected functional improvement to be shared

additional_information.admission_criteria: Functional disability due to post burn contracture (excluding neck) requiring surgical release and grafting

procedures.procedure_name:
Post Burn Contracture surgeries for Functional Improvement (Package including splints, pressure garments,contracture release & split skin graft with or without flap reconstruction,silicone - gel sheet and physiotherapy): Neck contracture; Contracture release with - Split thickness Skin Graft (STSG) / 
Full Thickness Skin Graft (FTSG) / Flap cover is done for each joint with post-operative regular dressings for STSG / FTSG / Flap cover.

preauth.label: Clinical history detailing the burns - etiology, treatment given and resultant contractures left
Functional disability to be detailed and expected functional improvement to be shared

additional_information.admission_criteria: Functional disability due to post burn neck contracture requiring surgical release and grafting/flap
